text: Subcontractors working on the project and those scheduled to start work the following week will be required to attend weekly Subcontractor coordination, schedule, and safety meetings at the site. For  design-build  Subcontractors  there  will  be  additional  mandatory  weekly  Coordination Meetings.  The person representing the Subcontractor will be a qualified foreman or superintendent and have the authority to make decisions and commitments for its company. The Subcontractor's superintendent and/or foreman must attend all weekly subcontractor meetings and provide daily reports using the Contractor's prescribed form listing the number of workers, the work being done and location of work elements. The time and day for the weekly subcontractor meetings shall be set by the Contractor. Subcontractor's failure to abide by the provisions regarding attendance at weekly progress/safety meetings shall be held responsible for any delays and/or expenses incurred due to coordination difficulties with its Work.
